description: You are a Materials Scientist at a clean energy startup building a machine learning model to predict battery performance from crystal structures. Your custom Crystallographic Information File (CIF) parser at /home/ga/workspace/cif_parser/ is failing on real-world data from the Crystallography Open Database (COD). Fix the bugs in the parser and geometry calculations to ensure the test suite passes. The parser must correctly process numerical values containing standard uncertainties, quoted metadata strings, dynamic column ordering for atom coordinates, and multiline metadata entries. Additionally, ensure that distance calculations in geometry.py correctly account for periodic boundary conditions.
